name: GimmeSimulators
about: Ace Indoor Golf, operating under the name GimmeSimulators, is a premier provider of golf simulator solutions for residential, commercial, and event rental purposes. The company specializes in sales, design, installation, and customization of golf simulators, boasting over 1,000 installations and extensive expertise across various brands. They offer a range of services from DIY golf simulator kits to fully integrated commercial systems that include video systems, launch monitors, and home theater components. Their commercial spaces are designed to enhance guest experiences for entertainment, lessons, or club-fitting, making them suitable for venues like sports bars, indoor golf centers, and family entertainment centers.
why_golfers_like_it: Fully integrated solutions combining top-tier launch monitors with immersive software
Professional installation and calibration service ensuring optimal performance
Customizable event rentals with mobile simulators for corporate functions and trade shows
Unrivaled industry experience with over 1,000 simulator installations
Stunning graphics and augmented reality feedback on every shot

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service available; mentioned in context of commercial simulator setups with bar areas
Full bar service available; mentioned in context of commercial simulator setups with bar areas

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end photometric camera system with P. Optix technology for accurate ball tracking
High-end photometric camera system for accurate ball and club tracking
Premium launch monitor using high-speed cameras for precise ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs. The venue does not mention club rentals as part of their standard service.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, external food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers a full bar and kitchen food service on-site for all guests.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes is not specified. It typically varies depending on the simulator software, the number of players, and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is suitable for families, with commercial setups designed for entertainment and a welcoming atmosphere for all ages.
